## Questions/comments to reviewer

_Please indicate if there are things to be aware of or things you need input on_

#### Links

#### Related PRs

-

## Type of change - please leave the relevant type(s)

- 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- 🆕 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- 💄 Adjustment (visual adjustment or simple adjustments to logic)
- 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Affected parts - please leave the relevant part(s)

- 🔨 These changes require a api update
- 🚩 These changes are affected by a feature flag
- 🤠 These changes work differently for different users

## Before you merge, remember to

- [ ] Resolve all the comments
- [ ] Update Asana
- [ ] Make sure you created / updated the related documentation if needed

## Screenshots, video recordings 📸 👇

_Trigger the [Storybook workflow](https://github.com/RequestFinance/invoicing/actions/workflows/storybook.yml) from your PR branch
(click on "Run workflow") to deploy a temporary showcase that will be automatically removed once the PR gets closed._
